queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: no checking account.
queries.question: Empirical analysis of the relationship between the absence of a checking account and decreased credit risk.

queries.feature_definition: Checking account status: balance below 0 DM.
queries.question: Impact of a negative checking account balance on the reduction of credit risk exposure.

queries.feature_definition: Present employment duration: less than 1 year.
queries.question: Statistical examination of how employment duration of less than one year contributes to increased credit default probability.
